response.justification: While the candidate meets the experience threshold (20+ years, Bachelor's + 8+ years), the resume lacks demonstrated expertise in the core technical areas required for this role. There is no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, hardware modeling languages, or AI/ML performance optimization—all critical for a Principal-level position. Recent experience focuses on web/full-stack development and AI infrastructure rather than hardware performance optimization.
strengths: 20+ years of technical experience exceeding educational + experience requirements
Demonstrated performance optimization expertise (low-latency systems, async I/O, caching at Dunnhumby)
Hardware-software co-design experience across robotic systems, embedded development, and systems-level work
concerns: No evidence of SoC or IP modeling experience—a core requirement for the role
No GPU architecture or AI accelerator experience; AI work is infrastructure/tooling, not performance optimization
Career trajectory is primarily web/full-stack (recent 5 years) rather than systems/hardware optimization focus
